description_long: This object is a retro personal computer setup, featuring a CRT monitor displaying a colorful game screen, a compact keyboard with multicolored keys, a joystick with a red button, and a cassette tape drive. The monitor is boxy and dark gray, with a thick frame and a slightly curved screen. The keyboard is rectangular, with a row of function keys and a distinctive set of colored keys on the right. The joystick is mounted on a base and connected by a cable, while the cassette drive has a simple interface with two visible tape reels. All components are interconnected by visible black cables, and the overall design is reminiscent of 1980s home computers. The materials appear to be primarily plastic with some metal and glass elements, and the setup is intended for tabletop use.
description: A vintage home computer setup with a CRT monitor, keyboard, joystick, and cassette tape drive, all connected by cables. The design is boxy and retro, with multicolored keys and a game displayed on the screen.
description_view_0: Front view showing the CRT monitor with a game screen, the full keyboard with colored keys, joystick, and cassette tape drive.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the CRT monitor and the arrangement of the keyboard, joystick, and cassette drive.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the monitor, cable connections, and the overall bulk of the setup.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the monitor's layered back, the cassette drive, and the joystick's position relative to the keyboard.
